case_title: JOHN FITCH VS. 909 GEARY STREET LLC DBA THE HARTLAND HOTEL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 909 GEARY STREET LLC DBA THE HARTLAND HOTEL TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH DEFENDANT AND CO-DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY FITCH, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT 909 GEARY STREET LLC DBA THE HARTLAND HOTEL TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 909 GEARY STREET LLC DBA THE HARTLAND HOTEL

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FITCH, JOHN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FITCH, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FITCH, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 909 GEARY STREET LLC DBA THE HARTLAND HOTEL TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. $100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $100.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS ESTIMATE COST OF CLEANING PLAINTIFF'S CLOTHING.
